title: Preferred Dietitian Referral
paragraphs: Find plant-based dietitians in your area or offering telehealth services in your state.
The Preferred Dietitian Referral program is a free database of qualified dietitians who are experts in plant-based nutrition.
Doctors, connect with dietitians and confidently refer your patients to them!
Patients, use this resource to find nutrition counseling near you!
Increase your visibility to doctors looking for a dietitian referral and patients looking for plant-based nutrition counseling.
Apply to Become a Preferred Dietitian
More information about the PDR, our doctor database, and the Physicians Committee can be found on our FAQ page. If you have questions or concerns, please contact nutrition [at] pcrm.org.
Prevention starts today. Join the 21-Day Vegan Kickstart.
Food for Life classes teach you how to improve your health with a plant-based diet.
